C) Everyone has to figure out who we are and why we are here. The author states this directly: "They believe that man cannot live by bread alone... that is to figure out who we are and why we are here." So C is a direct statement from the text. This seems like a strong candidate. D) People in modern society pay more attention to philosophical questions. The text doesn't mention modern society specifically.
